SeasonType.description: The season type of the timeframe (1=Regular Season, 2=Preseason, 3=Postseason, 4=Offseason, 5=All-Star)

Season.description: The league year of the timeframe (this gets incremented on the first day of the league year during free agency)

Week.description: The week of the timeframe (regular season: 1 to 18; preseason: 0 to 4; postseason: 1 to4; offseason=NULL). Note: seasons after 2021 will have only 3 preseason weeks

Name.description: The friendly name of the Timeframe

ShortName.description: The shorter name of the Timeframe

StartDate.description: The start date/time of this Timeframe

EndDate.description: The end date and time of the timeframe

FirstGameStart.description: The start date/time of the first game of the Timeframe (if no games then returns the StartDate)

FirstGameEnd.description: The end date/time of the first game of the Timeframe (if no games then returns the EndDate)

LastGameEnd.description: The end date/time of the last game of the Timeframe (if no games then returns the EndDate)

HasGames.description: Whether there are any games in this Timeframe

HasFirstGameStarted.description: Whether the first game has started

HasFirstGameEnded.description: Whether the first game has ended

HasLastGameEnded.description: Whether the last game has ended

ApiSeason.description: The value of the Season parameter used to pass into the API

ApiWeek.description: The value of the Week parameter used to pass into the API
